structure.title: Python Absolute Basics
structure.tagline: Los 6 conceptos que cubren el 80% del Python que vas a escribir

theory_blocks.heading: Variables y tipos de datos — la base de todo
theory_blocks.v3_map: partial S02-T1-A/B + f-strings slice of T4-A
theory_blocks.notes: Covers int/float/str/bool, list/dict/tuple/set, type/isinstance, casting, f-strings. Contenedores are deeper than S02 needs (S later).

theory_blocks.heading: Condicionales — tomando decisiones en el código
theory_blocks.v3_map: OUT OF SCOPE for S02 (belongs S03 T1–T2)
theory_blocks.notes: if/elif/else, comparison ops, truthiness — comparison ops relevant to T3-A but control flow is S03.

theory_blocks.heading: Loops — repitiendo acciones
theory_blocks.v3_map: OUT OF SCOPE for S02 (belongs S04 T1–T2)

theory_blocks.heading: Funciones — bloques reutilizables de código
theory_blocks.v3_map: OUT OF SCOPE for S02 (belongs S04+/functions sections)

theory_blocks.heading: List comprehensions — la forma pythónica de transformar listas
theory_blocks.v3_map: OUT OF SCOPE for S02 (belongs S04 T3)

iDo_steps.description: Modelar las notas de un alumno con tipos y estructuras
Calcular promedios con funciones y comprehensions
Agregar condicionales para clasificar y reportar

weDo_steps.v3_map: money example uses float — anti-pattern vs T3-B Decimal

youDo_project.title: Personal Budget Calculator — Tu primer programa real
youDo_project.maps_to_capstone: NONE — misaligned; should map to CP-N1-A intake parser increment
youDo_project.v3_target: Parser de intake: nombres, dos apellidos, contacto, dirección; conservar original; tests empty/Unicode/invalid number

selfCheck_questions.note: Only assign-vs-compare partially aligns with S02 T2/T3. Others belong later sections.

codePlayground_demo.verified: legacy outputs present; not re-verified this lane

gap.content_rescope: Remove S03/S04 material from S02 outcomes

issues_found.observed_evidence: S02 content teaches conditionals, loops, functions, comprehensions; V3 S02 is values/types/operators/I-O only.
issues_found.root_cause: V2 Absolute Basics mega-section not re-sliced for V3
issues_found.impact: Students practice wrong skills for gate; exam bank misaligned
issues_found.fix: Blueprint re-scope; PHASE 4 rewrite theory/iDo/weDo/youDo; park out-of-scope blocks for S03/S04
verification: no required loops/functions/comprehensions in S02 outcomes

issues_found.observed_evidence: youDo is Personal Budget Calculator; V3 gate is intake client record parser
issues_found.expected: Capture synthetic client: nombres, 2 apellidos, contacto, dirección; keep original; empty/Unicode/invalid number tests
issues_found.root_cause: Project written before CP-N1-A intake path
issues_found.fix: Replace youDo with intake parser increment in blueprint + PHASE 4

issues_found.fix: Author new subtopics in PHASE 4 from PHASE 2 research
